allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "sqlcmd -S '\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB' -d AggregatorDB -Q \\"SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE='BASE TABLE' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME\\" -h-1 -W")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "sqlcmd -S '\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB' -d AggregatorDB -Q \\"SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Users\) AS Users, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Partners\) AS Partners, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Customers\) AS Customers, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Subscriptions\) AS Subscriptions, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM AccountingSchemas\) AS Schemas, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM FeeConfigurations\) AS Fees, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM SystemParameters\) AS SysParams\\" -W")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\) | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; '\\''done'\\''')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "sqlcmd -S '\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB' -d AggregatorDB -Q \\"UPDATE Partners SET BaseUrl = 'http://localhost:5080' WHERE PartnerCode IN \('BANK_DEMO','WALLET_DEMO'\); SELECT PartnerCode, BaseUrl FROM Partners\\"")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\) | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; '\\''killed'\\''')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "sqlcmd -S '\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB' -d AggregatorDB -Q \\"SELECT 'Partners' AS T, COUNT\(*\) AS N FROM Partners UNION ALL SELECT 'Customers', COUNT\(*\) FROM Customers UNION ALL SELECT 'Subscriptions', COUNT\(*\) FROM Subscriptions UNION ALL SELECT 'Transactions', COUNT\(*\) FROM Transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Tx Success', COUNT\(*\) FROM Transactions WHERE Status=1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Tx Failed', COUNT\(*\) FROM Transactions WHERE Status=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'JournalEntries', COUNT\(*\) FROM JournalEntries UNION ALL SELECT 'JournalLines', COUNT\(*\) FROM JournalLines UNION ALL SELECT 'Movements', COUNT\(*\) FROM PartnerAccountMovements UNION ALL SELECT 'AuditLogs', COUNT\(*\) FROM AuditLogs UNION ALL SELECT 'WebhookLogs', COUNT\(*\) FROM WebhookLogs UNION ALL SELECT 'RefreshTokens', COUNT\(*\) FROM RefreshTokens\\" -W -h-1")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "sqlcmd -S '\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB' -d AggregatorDB -Q \\"SELECT TOP 6 PartnerTransactionRef, TransactionType, Amount, FeeAmount, NetAmount, Status, FailureReason, AccountingStatus, InitiatedAt FROM Transactions ORDER BY InitiatedAt DESC\\" -W -h-1")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs = data['searchResult'][1]['packages']; v = [p['version'] for p in pkgs if p['version'].startswith\('8.'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(v\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs = data['searchResult'][1]['packages']; v = [p['version'] for p in pkgs if p['version'].startswith\('8.'\)]; print\(v[-3:]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs = data['searchResult'][1]['packages']; v = [p['version'] for p in pkgs]; print\(v[-5:]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs = data['searchResult'][1]['packages']; v = [p['version'] for p in pkgs if p['version'].startswith\('17.'\)]; print\(v[-3:]\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -in \(Get-Process sqlservr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Id } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)
